creator: oleg.ginzburg@nevosoft.ru
text:
Bad url for fetching ahzedistcc-avahi-080101.patch in Makefile of devel/distcc:
{
===>  Vulnerability check disabled, database not found
===>  Found saved configuration for distcc-2.18.3_10
=> distcc-avahi-080101.patch doesn't seem to exist in /usr/ports/distfiles/.
=> Attempting to fetch from LOCAL/ahze.
fetch: LOCAL/ahzedistcc-avahi-080101.patch: Invalid URL scheme
=> Attempting to fetch from ftp://ftp.FreeBSD.org/pub/FreeBSD/ports/distfiles/.
fetch: ftp://ftp.FreeBSD.org/pub/FreeBSD/ports/distfiles/distcc-avahi-080101.patch: File unavailable (e.g., file not found, no access)
=> Couldn't fetch it - please try to retrieve this
=> port manually into /usr/ports/distfiles/ and try again.
*** Error code 1
}

How-To-Repeat: cd /usr/ports/devel/distcc && make WITH_AVAHI=yes patch
